findings.title: Redundant Error Messages in Auth Middleware
findings.detail: The `requireAuth` and `requireAdmin` functions return similar error messages for different authentication failures. This can be refactored into a single function or constant to avoid redundancy.

debt_findings.title: Redundant Error Messages in Auth Middleware
debt_findings.detail: The `requireAuth` and `requireAdmin` functions return similar error messages for different authentication failures. This can be refactored into a single function or constant to avoid redundancy.

required_followups: Consider consolidating the error messages for authentication failures into a single function or using a shared constant across these middleware functions to avoid redundancy.
